text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day after school, I'm taking a<n>short break
from work when two<n>Umamusume call out to me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! Could you spare a<n>second to
listen to my friend sing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She has a singing test tomorrow and<n>wants to
prepare for it by practicing<n>with an audience!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hello... I'm not really good at<n>singing in front
of people... so, ummm...<n>If you don't mind...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Great! We'll cheer you on, so sing<n>your heart
out!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Okay! Well, um... Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: La-la... La, laaaa...

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Oh, I just can't do it. It's too<n>
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How about I sing with you? We can<n>split the
embarrassment between us<n>that way!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: La-la, la-laaaaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Move your body to the<n>rhythm too!
Let's pretend we're at a<n>festival and let loose!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Kitasan Black singing and<n>dancing with her,
the girl slowly starts<n>to smile, and her voice
gradually gets<n>louder!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's the spirit! Now use that<n>diaphram to
belt out that last note!<n>Ready?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: LAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text: LAAAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Now we're talking—or<n>should I say
shouting? How do you<n>feel now?

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! I don't feel embarrassed at<n>all
anymore!
choice_data_list: You have a good set of pipes!
You have a good set of pipes!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! I don't feel embarrassed at<n>all
anymore!
choice_data_list: You have a good set of pipes!
You have a good set of pipes!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!
Now you've just gotta get ready for the test!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't she?! I tired myself out just<n>trying to
sing next to her!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Kita! I can't wait for<n>tomorrow! This is
the first time I've<n>ever felt this good about my
singing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear it! I'm sure you're<n>gonna hit it out
of the park!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! You've gotta take care<n>of your
throat! Especially before the<n>big show!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! That's really<n>important. You
really think of<n>everything, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ I'm just trying to be helpful<n>is all!
